rationale: This page provides a concise summary of the Khilafat Movement, detailing its geographical base in Lucknow, its primary religious-political objectives regarding the Ottoman Empire, and its significance in fostering Hindu-Muslim unity against British colonial rule.
cleanedText:
The Khilafat Movement
Active Base: The Khilafat Movement had an active base of support in Lucknow, creating united opposition to British rule.
Objective: The movement aimed to create a Caliphate and protect the Ottoman Empire's authority.
Unity: It brought together Hindu and Muslim leaders in a common cause against colonial rule.
